---
name: Multi-level Copier Template Issue
about: Tasks that require editing multiple levels of the Copier template
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''
type: Task

---

Describe the task to be completed and how it applies to the project, module, etl, and/or rule templates. 

- [ ] Create sub-issue in this repo
  - [ ] Create a branch for that sub-issue
- [ ] Open an issue in the child-template repos related to this task
  - [ ] In the issue description, link back to this main issue
  - [ ] Create a branch for the issue
- [ ] Check out and work on each sub-issues' branches
- [ ] Open PR and merge this repo into `main`
- [ ] Update each child-template test fixtures to point to new `main` commit
- [ ] Open PR and merge each sub-issue into their respective `main` branch.
